2603.15386.title: RieMind: Geometry-Grounded Spatial Agent for Scene Understanding
2603.15386.paper_summary: Visual Language Models (VLMs) have increasingly become the main paradigm for understanding indoor scenes, but they still struggle with metric and spatial reasoning. Current approaches rely on end-to-end video understanding or large-scale spatial question answering fine-tuning, inherently coupling perception and reasoning. In this paper, we investigate whether decoupling perception and reasoning leads to improved spatial reasoning. We propose an agentic framework for static 3D indoor scene reasoning that grounds an LLM in an explicit 3D scene graph (3DSG). Rather than ingesting videos directly, each scene is represented as a persistent 3DSG constructed by a dedicated perception module. To isolate reasoning performance, we instantiate the 3DSG from ground-truth annotations. The agent interacts with the scene exclusively through structured geometric tools that expose fundamental properties such as object dimensions, distances, poses, and spatial relationships. The results we obtain on the static split of VSI-Bench provide an upper bound under ideal perceptual conditions on the spatial reasoning performance, and we find that it is significantly higher than previous works, by up to 16\%, without task specific fine-tuning. Compared to base VLMs, our agentic variant achieves significantly better performance, with average improvements between 33\% to 50\%. These findings indicate that explicit geometric grounding substantially improves spatial reasoning performance, and suggest that structured representations offer a compelling alternative to purely end-to-end visual reasoning.
2603.15386.paper_summary_zh: 視覺語言模型（VLMs）越來越成為理解室內場景的主要範式，但它們在度量和空間推理方面仍然存在困難。當前的方法依賴於端到端的視頻理解或大規模的空間問題回答微調，這本質上將感知和推理結合在一起。在本文中，我們探討了是否將感知和推理解耦會導致空間推理的改善。我們提出了一個靜態3D室內場景推理的代理框架，該框架將LLM基於一個明確的3D場景圖（3DSG）。每個場景不是直接攝取視頻，而是由專門的感知模塊構建為持久的3DSG。為了隔離推理性能，我們從真實標註中實例化3DSG。代理僅通過結構化幾何工具與場景互動，這些工具揭示了物體尺寸、距離、姿勢和空間關係等基本屬性。我們在VSI-Bench的靜態分割上獲得的結果提供了在理想感知條件下空間推理性能的上限，我們發現它顯著高於之前的工作，增幅可達16\%，且無需特定任務的微調。與基礎VLMs相比，我們的代理變體實現了顯著更好的性能，平均改善幅度在33\%到50\%之間。這些發現表明，明確的幾何基礎顯著改善了空間推理性能，並且表明結構化表示提供了一個引人注目的替代方案，而不僅僅是純粹的端到端視覺推理。
2603.15386.author: Fernando Ropero et.al.
2603.15386.authors: Fernando Ropero, Erkin Turkoz, Daniel Matos, Junqing Du, Antonio Ruiz, Yanfeng Zhang, Lu Liu, Mingwei Sun, Yongliang Wang
